tauri.description: Run Tauri CLI via Deno (no Node install required)

dev.description: Start Tauri in development mode (hot reload, fast iteration)

build:debug.description: Build debug version of Tauri app

build:all.command: deno task build && deno task build:debug

clean.description: Remove Tauri/Rust build artifacts so the next build is fresh

rebuild.description: Clean and rebuild the production Tauri app bundle
rebuild.command: deno task clean && deno task build

rebuild:debug.description: Clean and rebuild the debug Tauri app bundle
rebuild:debug.command: deno task clean && deno task build:debug

run:binary.description: Run built app binary directly (fast, shows logs in terminal)

run:debug.description: Run built debug binary directly (fast, shows logs in terminal)

run:app.description: Open built .app via Finder (simulates real user launch)

test:binary.description: Build app and run binary with terminal logs
test:binary.command: deno task build && deno task run:binary

test:app.description: Build app and open it like a user would
test:app.command: deno task build && deno task run:app

version.description: Update app version in config files

transcribe.description: Run whisper.cpp and create Cuebert-loadable JSON

transcribe:compile.description: Build the Cuebert whisper.cpp preprocessor as a local binary

logs.description: Show last 200 lines of app log file

logs:follow.description: Follow app log file in real time

context:zip.description: Create a slim zip of source/config files for AI handoff

run:dev.description: Run Deno frontend script directly (non-Tauri dev mode)

transcribe:zip.description: Build and zip the Cuebert transcription kit for AirDrop
transcribe:zip.command: deno task transcribe:package && rm -f cuebert-transcription-kit.zip && zip -r cuebert-transcription-kit.zip cuebert-transcription-kit
